question: Do four 2014 metric claims abbreviated as Q20 describe the distinct Q20 route that began service in 2025?

historical_evidence.role: The deck defines the historical route identity before abbreviating the same bus line as Q20 in its metric table and chart.

historical_evidence.source_statement: Route Weekday Ridership Peak Frequency Q20 13,609 12 minutes
historical_evidence.role: Source of the weekday-ridership and peak-frequency claims whose Q20 label is contextual shorthand for the deck's Q20A/B bus line.
Source of the corridor-ridership-share claim whose Q20 label is contextual shorthand for the historical Q20A/B bus line.

historical_evidence.source_statement: Bus trips on the Q20A/B and Q44LTD on Main Street ... were characterized ... as being very long and slow
historical_evidence.role: The workshop summary explicitly defines the historical combined Q20A/B bus line immediately before its abbreviated ridership table.
Source of the daily-ridership claim; the preceding paragraph resolves the abbreviated Q20 label as historical Q20A/B.

current_lifecycle_evidence.role: The official lifecycle row proves that the current Q20 is a distinct route identity beginning more than a decade after the historical metrics.

decision.rationale: Mechanical exact-label derivation cannot distinguish the 2014 Q20 shorthand from the new Q20 designation. The surrounding official 2014 evidence resolves all four metric claims to the historical Q20A/B aggregate, while official 2025 evidence starts the distinct current Q20 on June 29, 2025. The four derived edges are therefore lifecycle-mismatched and must not attach historical metrics to the current route.

preservation_contract: Preserve all four source-stated metric records, values, evidence references, and Q20 source literals.
Do not retarget the aggregate historical metrics to Q20A alone or Q20B alone.
Retract only the four exact deterministic derived relations to route_q20-qbnr-2025.
Preserve the 2025 Q20 route, service-start event, treatments, and project relations.
A future historical Q20A/B aggregate scope record may receive these metrics only through a separate evidence-backed review.
